title: Replace pilot conditional_items with conditionally enabled concrete objects
objective: Update conditional_items for 桌面+学习, 海底+潜水, and 公园+野餐 so entries are medium-or-larger concrete objects that are only suitable when matching support/context is visible.
requirements: Keep pilot box ids 15, 16, and 17 unchanged.
Do not add non-object phenomena, traces, line changes, tiny labels, or edge details.
Prefer common, boundary-clear, independently circleable objects.
acceptance_criteria: Each pilot bundle has a non-empty conditional_items list.
All conditional_items are concrete objects, not scratches, folds, bubbles, shadows, edges, stains, or tiny particles.
Items read as conditionally enabled: plausible only with a visible carrier, support, or scene context.
verification: Review conditional_items manually for the three pilot scenes.

result.summary: Replaced all three pilot conditional_items lists with medium-or-larger concrete conditionally enabled objects.
